questions.question: Describe the importance of project planning in software development. How does it impact the overall success of a project?
questions.hint: Explain the role of project planning in planning, organizing, and controlling resources

questions.question: How does quality management contribute to the delivery of high-quality software products? Provide an example of a quality management process.
questions.hint: Explain the role of quality management in ensuring customer satisfaction and meeting stakeholder expectations

questions.question: Compare and contrast the concepts of project planning and quality management in software development. How do they work together to ensure successful project outcomes?
questions.hint: Explain the inter-relationship between project planning and quality management
